rules.desc: Anatomical plausibility — skeletal and muscular structure supports locomotion and body mass
rules.rationale_pass: Anatomy is plausible — structure supports locomotion and mass (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Anatomy implausible — structure cannot support locomotion or body mass (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Consistent anatomy across all views and poses — proportions, joint placement, and limb count stable
rules.rationale_pass: Anatomy consistent across views — proportions and joints stable (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Anatomy inconsistent — proportions or joints shift between views (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Silhouette distinction — creature identifiable by outline alone at reduced scale
rules.rationale_pass: Silhouette distinctive — creature readable by outline alone (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Silhouette generic — creature not identifiable by outline (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Surface and texture consistency — skin, scales, fur, chitin, or other covering is coherent across the body
rules.rationale_pass: Surface texture coherent — covering reads consistently across the body (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Surface texture inconsistent — covering changes illogically across the body (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Evolutionary logic — adaptations serve ecological function, not purely decorative
rules.rationale_pass: Adaptations make ecological sense — form follows function (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Adaptations lack ecological logic — features are purely decorative (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Scale reference present and readable — creature size clear relative to known objects or figures
rules.rationale_pass: Scale reference clear — creature size readable against reference (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Scale reference missing or unreadable — creature size ambiguous (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Locomotion class reads clearly — biped, quadruped, flying, aquatic, serpentine, or hybrid
rules.rationale_pass: Locomotion class clear — movement mode reads from anatomy (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Locomotion class unclear — cannot determine how creature moves (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Behavioral cues present in pose, expression, or body language — predator, prey, social, solitary
rules.rationale_pass: Behavioral cues present — temperament reads from pose and expression (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Behavioral cues absent — creature pose is neutral and uninformative (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Style consistency across species or creature lineup — rendering, detail level, and design language match
rules.rationale_pass: Style consistent — creature fits the lineup's design language (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style inconsistent — creature looks like it belongs to a different project (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Habitat integration — creature anatomy and coloring fit the environment context
rules.rationale_pass: Habitat integration reads — creature fits its environment context (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Habitat mismatch — creature does not fit the environment context (${scorePct}%)
